creator: andrey@bsdnir.info
text:
(In reply to viktors.trubovics from comment #4)
Check whether the program you have (contain /usr/local/bin/unzip)
% whereis -a unzip
unzip: /usr/bin/unzip /usr/local/bin/unzip /usr/share/man/man1/unzip.1.gz /usr/local/man/man1/unzip.1.gz /usr/ports/archivers/unzip

Or install https://www.freebsd.org/doc/handbook/ports.html need port archivers/unzip or pkg unzip-6.0_6

/usr/bin/unzip and /usr/local/bin/unzip It is a different version of the program with a different functionality and support different functions

If the program is installed, run it must specify the full path
